    Lemmas about ranges #

    This file provides lemmas about Std.PRange.

    source
    theorem Std.PRange.UpwardEnumerable.exists_of_succ_le {α : Type u} [UpwardEnumerable α] [LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [InfinitelyUpwardEnumerable α] {a b : α} (h : UpwardEnumerable.LE (succ a) b) :
    ∃ (b' : α), b = succ b' ∧ UpwardEnumerable.LE a b'
    source
    theorem Std.PRange.UpwardEnumerable.exists_of_succ_lt {α : Type u} [UpwardEnumerable α] [LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [InfinitelyUpwardEnumerable α] {a b : α} (h : UpwardEnumerable.LT (succ a) b) :
    ∃ (b' : α), b = succ b' ∧ UpwardEnumerable.LT a b'
    source
    theorem Std.Rcc.forIn'_congr {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] {γ : Type u} {init init' : γ} {r r' : Rcc α} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} {f' : (a : α) → a ∈ r' → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} (hr : r = r') (hi : init = init') (h : ∀ (a : α) (m_1 : a ∈ r') (b : γ), f a ⋯ b = f' a m_1 b) :
    forIn' r init f = forIn' r' init' f'
    source
    theorem Std.Rco.forIn'_congr {α : Type u} [LE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] {γ : Type u} {init init' : γ} {r r' : Rco α} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} {f' : (a : α) → a ∈ r' → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} (hr : r = r') (hi : init = init') (h : ∀ (a : α) (m_1 : a ∈ r') (b : γ), f a ⋯ b = f' a m_1 b) :
    forIn' r init f = forIn' r' init' f'
    source
    theorem Std.Rci.forIn'_congr {α : Type u} [LE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] {γ : Type u} {init init' : γ} {r r' : Rci α} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} {f' : (a : α) → a ∈ r' → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} (hr : r = r') (hi : init = init') (h : ∀ (a : α) (m_1 : a ∈ r') (b : γ), f a ⋯ b = f' a m_1 b) :
    forIn' r init f = forIn' r' init' f'
    source
    theorem Std.Roc.forIn'_congr {α : Type u} [LE α] [LT α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] {γ : Type u} {init init' : γ} {r r' : Roc α} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} {f' : (a : α) → a ∈ r' → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} (hr : r = r') (hi : init = init') (h : ∀ (a : α) (m_1 : a ∈ r') (b : γ), f a ⋯ b = f' a m_1 b) :
    forIn' r init f = forIn' r' init' f'
    source

    theorem Std.Rxc.Iterator.toList_eq_match {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] {it : Iter α} :
    it.toList = match it.internalState.next with | none => [] | some a => if a ≤ it.internalState.upperBound then a :: { internalState := { next := PRange.succ? a, upperBound := it.internalState.upperBound } }.toList else []
    source
    theorem Std.Rxc.Iterator.toArray_eq_match {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] {it : Iter α} :
    it.toArray = match it.internalState.next with | none => #[] | some a => if a ≤ it.internalState.upperBound then #[a] ++ { internalState := { next := PRange.succ? a, upperBound := it.internalState.upperBound } }.toArray else #[]
    source
    theorem Std.Rxo.Iterator.toList_eq_match {α : Type u} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] {it : Iter α} :
    it.toList = match it.internalState.next with | none => [] | some a => if a < it.internalState.upperBound then a :: { internalState := { next := PRange.succ? a, upperBound := it.internalState.upperBound } }.toList else []
    source
    theorem Std.Rxo.Iterator.toArray_eq_match {α : Type u} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] {it : Iter α} :
    it.toArray = match it.internalState.next with | none => #[] | some a => if a < it.internalState.upperBound then #[a] ++ { internalState := { next := PRange.succ? a, upperBound := it.internalState.upperBound } }.toArray else #[]
    source
    theorem Std.Rxc.Iterator.toList_eq_toList_rxoIterator {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.InfinitelyUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LinearlyUpwardEnumerable α] {it : Iter α} :
    it.toList = { internalState := { next := it.internalState.next, upperBound := PRange.succ it.internalState.upperBound } }.toList
    source
    theorem Std.Rxi.Iterator.toList_eq_match {α : Type u} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {it : Iter α} :

    source
    theorem Std.Rxi.Iterator.toArray_eq_match {α : Type u} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {it : Iter α} :
    it.toArray = match it.internalState.next with | none => #[] | some a => #[a] ++ { internalState := { next := PRange.succ? a } }.toArray

    r.toList = if r.lower ≤ r.upper then r.lower :: (r.lower<...=r.upper).toList else []

        (a ∈ (PRange.succ lo)...=PRange.succ hi) ↔ ∃ (a' : α), a = PRange.succ a' ∧ a' ∈ lo...=hi

          theorem Std.Rcc.forIn'_eq_if {α : Type u} {r : Rcc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
          forIn' r init f = if hu : r.lower ≤ r.upper then have hle := ⋯; do let __do_lift ← f r.lower ⋯ init match __do_lift with | ForInStep.yield c => forIn' (r.lower<...=r.upper) c fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ r.lower<...=r.upper) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc | ForInStep.done c => pure c else pure init
          source

          r.isEmpty = true ↔ ∀ (a : α), ¬a ∈ r

                      theorem Std.Roc.toList_eq_nil_iff {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] :
                      r.toList = [] ↔ ¬r.lower < r.upper

                      r.toArray = #[] ↔ ¬r.lower < r.upper
                      source

                      a ∈ r.toList ↔ a ∈ r

                      a ∈ r.toArray ↔ a ∈ r
                      source

                      List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => PRange.UpwardEnumerable.LT a b) r.toList
                      source

                      (a<...=b).toList.Nodup
                      source

                      List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => a ≠ b) r.toList
                      source

                      source

                      List.Pairwise (fun (a b : α) => a ≤ b) r.toList

                      (a ∈ (PRange.succ lo)<...=PRange.succ hi) ↔ ∃ (a' : α), a = PRange.succ a' ∧ a' ∈ lo<...=hi
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.succ_mem_succ_succ_iff {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LinearlyUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.InfinitelyUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {lo hi a : α} :
                      (PRange.succ a ∈ (PRange.succ lo)<...=PRange.succ hi) ↔ a ∈ lo<...=hi
                      source

                      ((PRange.succ lo)<...=PRange.succ hi).toList = List.map PRange.succ (lo<...=hi).toList
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.toArray_succ_succ_eq_map {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LinearlyUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.InfinitelyUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {lo hi : α} :
                      ((PRange.succ lo)<...=PRange.succ hi).toArray = Array.map PRange.succ (lo<...=hi).toArray
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.forIn'_eq_forIn'_toList {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
                      forIn' r init f = forIn' r.toList init fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ r.toList) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.forIn'_eq_forIn'_toArray {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
                      forIn' r init f = forIn' r.toArray init fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ r.toArray) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.forIn'_toList_eq_forIn' {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r.toList → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
                      forIn' r.toList init f = forIn' r init fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ r) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.forIn'_toArray_eq_forIn' {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r.toArray → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
                      forIn' r.toArray init f = forIn' r init fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ r) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.mem_of_mem_of_le {α : Type u} [LE α] [LT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] {lo lo' hi a : α} (h : lo ≤ lo') (hmem : a ∈ lo'<...=hi) :
                      a ∈ lo<...=hi
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roc.forIn'_eq_match {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
                      forIn' r init f = match hs : PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => pure init | some next => if hu : next ≤ r.upper then have hlt := ⋯; do let __do_lift ← f next ⋯ init match __do_lift with | ForInStep.yield c => forIn' (next<...=r.upper) c fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ next<...=r.upper) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc | ForInStep.done c => pure c else pure init
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roo.toList_eq_match {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] :
                      r.toList = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => [] | some next => if next < r.upper then next :: (next<...r.upper).toList else []
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roo.toArray_eq_match {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [LE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] :
                      r.toArray = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => #[] | some next => if next < r.upper then #[next] ++ (next<...r.upper).toArray else #[]
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roo.toList_eq_match_rco {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] :
                      r.toList = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => [] | some next => (next...r.upper).toList
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roo.toArray_eq_match_rco {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] :
                      r.toArray = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => #[] | some next => (next...r.upper).toArray
                      source

                      theorem Std.Roo.toArray_toList {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] :

                      r.toList = [] ↔ ∀ (a : α), PRange.succ? r.lower = some a → ¬a < r.upper
                      source
                      theorem Std.Roo.toArray_eq_empty_iff {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [LE α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] :
                      r.toArray = #[] ↔ ∀ (a : α), PRange.succ? r.lower = some a → ¬a < r.upper

                      (a<...b).toList.Nodup

                      theorem Std.Roo.forIn'_toList_eq_forIn' {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r.toList → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :

                      forIn' r.toArray init f = forIn' r init fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ r) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc

                      theorem Std.Roo.forIn'_eq_match {α : Type u} {r : Roo α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] {m : Type u → Type w} [Monad m] [LawfulMonad m] {γ : Type u} {init : γ} {f : (a : α) → a ∈ r → γ → m (ForInStep γ)} :
                      forIn' r init f = match hs : PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => pure init | some next => if hu : next < r.upper then have hlt := ⋯; have hle := ⋯; do let __do_lift ← f next ⋯ init match __do_lift with | ForInStep.yield c => forIn' (next<...r.upper) c fun (a : α) (ha : a ∈ next<...r.upper) (acc : γ) => f a ⋯ acc | ForInStep.done c => pure c else pure init

                      r.toList = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => [] | some next => next :: next<...*.toList

                                                                                r.toList.length = r.size

                                                                                r.toArray.size = r.size
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Roc.getElem?_toList_eq {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} :
                                                                                r.toList[i]? = Option.filter (fun (x : α) => decide (x ≤ r.upper)) (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower)
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Roc.getElem?_toArray_eq {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} :
                                                                                r.toArray[i]? = Option.filter (fun (x : α) => decide (x ≤ r.upper)) (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower)
                                                                                source

                                                                                (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).isSome = true
                                                                                source

                                                                                (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).isSome = true

                                                                                theorem Std.Roc.getElem_toList_eq {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toList.length} :
                                                                                r.toList[i] = (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Roc.getElem_toArray_eq {α : Type u} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] {r : Roc α} {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toArray.size} :
                                                                                r.toArray[i] = (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Roc.eq_succMany?_of_toList_eq_append_cons {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : List α} {cur : α} (h : r.toList = pref ++ cur :: suff) :
                                                                                cur = (PRange.succMany? (pref.length + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Roc.eq_succMany?_of_toArray_eq_append_append {α : Type u} {r : Roc α} [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : Array α} {cur : α} (h : r.toArray = pref ++ #[cur] ++ suff) :
                                                                                cur = (PRange.succMany? (pref.size + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Ric.size_eq_match_rcc {α : Type u} {r : Ric α} [PRange.Least? α] [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxc.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxc.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                r.size = match PRange.least? with | none => 0 | some next => (next...=r.upper).size
                                                                                source
                                                                                theorem Std.Ric.size_eq_match_roc {α : Type u} {r : Ric α} [PRange.Least? α] [LE α] [DecidableLE α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxc.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLE α] [Rxc.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxc.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                r.size = match PRange.least? with | none => 0 | some next => if next ≤ r.upper then (next<...=r.upper).size + 1 else 0
                                                                                source

                                                                                  theorem Std.Rio.isSome_succMany?_of_lt_length_toList {α : Type u} {r : Rio α} [PRange.Least? α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} (h : i < r.toList.length) :
                                                                                  (PRange.succMany? i PRange.UpwardEnumerable.least).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rio.isSome_succMany?_of_lt_size_toArray {α : Type u} {r : Rio α} [PRange.Least? α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} (h : i < r.toArray.size) :
                                                                                  (PRange.succMany? i PRange.UpwardEnumerable.least).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rio.getElem_toList_eq {α : Type u} {r : Rio α} [PRange.Least? α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toList.length} :
                                                                                  r.toList[i] = (PRange.succMany? i PRange.UpwardEnumerable.least).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rio.getElem_toArray_eq {α : Type u} [PRange.Least? α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] {r : Rio α} {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toArray.size} :
                                                                                  r.toArray[i] = (PRange.succMany? i PRange.UpwardEnumerable.least).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rio.eq_succMany?_of_toList_eq_append_cons {α : Type u} {r : Rio α} [PRange.Least? α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : List α} {cur : α} (h : r.toList = pref ++ cur :: suff) :
                                                                                  cur = (PRange.succMany? pref.length PRange.UpwardEnumerable.least).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rio.eq_succMany?_of_toArray_eq_append_append {α : Type u} {r : Rio α} [PRange.Least? α] [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxo.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : Array α} {cur : α} (h : r.toArray = pref ++ #[cur] ++ suff) :
                                                                                  cur = (PRange.succMany? pref.size PRange.UpwardEnumerable.least).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rci.size_eq_size_roi {α : Type u} {r : Rci α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.size = r.lower<...*.size + 1
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rci.size_eq_match_rci {α : Type u} {r : Rci α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.size = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => 1 | some next => next...*.size + 1
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rci.length_toList {α : Type u} {r : Rci α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.toList.length = r.size
                                                                                  source

                                                                                  r.toArray.size = r.size
                                                                                  source

                                                                                  r.toList[i]? = PRange.succMany? i r.lower
                                                                                  source

                                                                                  r.toArray[i]? = PRange.succMany? i r.lower

                                                                                  (PRange.succMany? i r.lower).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rci.isSome_succMany?_of_lt_size_toArray {α : Type u} {r : Rci α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} (h : i < r.toArray.size) :
                                                                                  (PRange.succMany? i r.lower).isSome = true

                                                                                  r.toList[i] = (PRange.succMany? i r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rci.getElem_toArray_eq {α : Type u} {r : Rci α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toArray.size} :
                                                                                  r.toArray[i] = (PRange.succMany? i r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source

                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rci.eq_succMany?_of_toArray_eq_append_append {α : Type u} {r : Rci α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : Array α} {cur : α} (h : r.toArray = pref ++ #[cur] ++ suff) :
                                                                                  cur = (PRange.succMany? pref.size r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.size_eq_match_rci {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.size = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => 0 | some next => next...*.size
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.size_eq_match_roi {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.size = match PRange.succ? r.lower with | none => 0 | some next => next<...*.size + 1
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  @[simp]

                                                                                  @[simp]

                                                                                  r.toArray.size = r.size

                                                                                  r.toList[i]? = PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.getElem?_toArray_eq {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} :

                                                                                  (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.isSome_succMany?_of_lt_size_toArray {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} (h : i < r.toArray.size) :
                                                                                  (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.getElem_toList_eq {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toList.length} :
                                                                                  r.toList[i] = (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.getElem_toArray_eq {α : Type u} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {r : Roi α} {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toArray.size} :
                                                                                  r.toArray[i] = (PRange.succMany? (i + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.eq_succMany?_of_toList_eq_append_cons {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : List α} {cur : α} (h : r.toList = pref ++ cur :: suff) :
                                                                                  cur = (PRange.succMany? (pref.length + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Roi.eq_succMany?_of_toArray_eq_append_append {α : Type u} {r : Roi α} [LT α] [DecidableLT α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLT α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : Array α} {cur : α} (h : r.toArray = pref ++ #[cur] ++ suff) :
                                                                                  cur = (PRange.succMany? (pref.size + 1) r.lower).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.size_eq_match_rci {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.size = match PRange.least? with | none => 0 | some next => next...*.size
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.size_eq_match_roi {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.size = match PRange.least? with | none => 0 | some next => next<...*.size + 1
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.length_toList {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.toList.length = r.size
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.size_toArray {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.HasSize α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] [Rxi.LawfulHasSize α] :
                                                                                  r.toArray.size = r.size

                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.getElem?_toList_eq {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} :
                                                                                  r.toList[i]? = PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? i)
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.getElem?_toArray_eq {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} :
                                                                                  r.toArray[i]? = PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? i)
                                                                                  source

                                                                                  (PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? i)).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.isSome_succMany?_of_lt_size_toArray {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} (h : i < r.toArray.size) :
                                                                                  (PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? i)).isSome = true
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.getElem_toList_eq {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toList.length} :
                                                                                  r.toList[i] = (PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? i)).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.getElem_toArray_eq {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {i : Nat} {h : i < r.toArray.size} :
                                                                                  r.toArray[i] = (PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? i)).get ⋯
                                                                                  source

                                                                                  cur = (PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? pref.length)).get ⋯
                                                                                  source
                                                                                  theorem Std.Rii.eq_succMany?_of_toArray_eq_append_append {α : Type u} {r : Rii α} [PRange.Least? α] [PRange.UpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerable α] [PRange.LawfulUpwardEnumerableLeast? α] [Rxi.IsAlwaysFinite α] {pref suff : Array α} {cur : α} (h : r.toArray = pref ++ #[cur] ++ suff) :
                                                                                  cur = (PRange.least?.bind (PRange.succMany? pref.size)).get ⋯
